email_opening: I have followed your work at Columbia Business School and your focus on leaders navigating strategy-heavy transition moments.
email_body_core: Starting Monday adds a coach-first execution layer: target-list discipline, market-signal tracking, outreach drafts, and prep briefs, while protecting your client relationship.
default_subject: For your Strategy clients: confidential execution support
default_body:
Hi Rita,

You coach leaders navigating strategy-heavy transition moments. I run Starting Monday, a private search-operations platform for senior operators in transition.

Coaches I speak with consistently want three things:
- a coach-first model that protects the trust you already own with the client
- practical weekly execution: targets, signals, outreach drafts, and prep briefs
- strict confidentiality: no poaching, no noise, no heavy program overhead

Given your work at Columbia Business School, this may be useful for select clients who need disciplined execution between coaching sessions.

Would it be a bad idea to do a 15-minute fit check next week?

Best,
Richard Rothschild
startingmonday.app
